---
title: "Python Env Loader Test"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import os
import sys
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path


current = Path.cwd().resolve()
repo_root = next(
    candidate
    for candidate in (current, *current.parents)
    if (candidate / ".git").exists()
)
sys.path.insert(0, str(repo_root))

from py_scripts.lib.utils.repo_paths import find_repo_root


repo_root = find_repo_root(current)
```

```{python}
from py_scripts.lib.utils.env import load_repo_env
from py_scripts.lib.utils.paths import default_talent_root, processed_root


tracked_names = (
    "CODEX_ENV_LOADER_TEST",
    "CODEX_ENV_LOADER_EXISTING",
    "TALENT_REPO_ROOT",
    "TALENT_DATALAKE_ROOT",
    "TALENT_PROCESSED_ROOT",
)
old_values = {name: os.environ.get(name) for name in tracked_names}

try:
    temp_root = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="repo-env-notebook-"))
    (temp_root / ".env").write_text(
        "\n".join(
            (
                "CODEX_ENV_LOADER_TEST=from_python_notebook_env",
                "CODEX_ENV_LOADER_EXISTING=from_env_file",
                "TALENT_DATALAKE_ROOT=/tmp/python-notebook-talent-root",
                "TALENT_PROCESSED_ROOT=/tmp/python-notebook-processed-root",
            )
        )
        + "\n",
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    os.environ["CODEX_ENV_LOADER_EXISTING"] = "already_exported"
    os.environ["TALENT_REPO_ROOT"] = str(temp_root)
    for name in ("CODEX_ENV_LOADER_TEST", "TALENT_DATALAKE_ROOT", "TALENT_PROCESSED_ROOT"):
        os.environ.pop(name, None)

    load_repo_env(repo_root=temp_root)

    assert os.environ["CODEX_ENV_LOADER_TEST"] == "from_python_notebook_env"
    assert os.environ["CODEX_ENV_LOADER_EXISTING"] == "already_exported"
    assert str(default_talent_root()) == "/tmp/python-notebook-talent-root"
    assert str(processed_root()) == "/tmp/python-notebook-processed-root"

    [
        {"check": "loads values from .env", "status": "pass"},
        {"check": "preserves exported values", "status": "pass"},
        {"check": "default_talent_root uses .env", "status": "pass"},
        {"check": "processed_root uses .env", "status": "pass"},
    ]
finally:
    for name, value in old_values.items():
        if value is None:
            os.environ.pop(name, None)
        else:
            os.environ[name] = value
```
